/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/aiplayer.dir/aiplayer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiplayer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiplayer.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiplayer.dir/src/mpvwidget.cpp.o -o aiplayer.app/Contents/MacOS/aiplayer -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,@executable_path/../Frameworks -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/../Frameworks -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/src -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/ggml-blas -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/ggml-metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtOpenGLWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGLWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork _deps/whispercpp-build/src/libwhisper.1.8.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers /opt/homebrew/Cellar/mpv/0.41.0_4/lib/libmpv.dylib _deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/libggml.0.9.8.dylib _deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.0.9.8.dylib _deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/ggml-blas/libggml-blas.0.9.8.dylib _deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/ggml-metal/libggml-metal.0.9.8.dylib _deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/libggml-base.0.9.8.dylib
